opinion.h: Ronald L. REECE, petitioner, v. Walter E. CRAVEN, Warden. No. 72-6359.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of California denied.
Mr. Justice DOUGLAS concurs in the denial certiorari solely because the judgment below rests on an adequate state ground.[ Reece v. Craven 412 U.S. 962 (1973) ]
